title: Skeptrostachys arechavaletanii
taxonomy: Skeptrostachys arechavaletanii belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Skeptrostachys. This plant is native to Sri Lanka and is a type of herbaceous plant. The classification of Skeptrostachys arechavaletanii is primarily based on its botanical characteristics and genetic makeup. Further research is needed to confirm its exact classification within the Acanthaceae family.
